testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should select all forecasts from items
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should select all forecasts from items

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should return an empty array when no forecasts are loaded
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should return an empty array when no forecasts are loaded

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should select the selected forecast
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should select the selected forecast

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should return null when nothing is selected
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should return null when nothing is selected

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should select the loading flag (true)
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should select the loading flag (true)

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should select the loading flag (false)
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should select the loading flag (false)

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should select the error message
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should select the error message

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should return null for error when no error is present
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should return null for error when no error is present

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should derive forecast count from items length
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should derive forecast count from items length

testcase.classname: weatherForecast selectors test should return 0 for forecast count when items is empty
testcase.name: weatherForecast selectors test should return 0 for forecast count when items is empty

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test should return initial state when called with undefined state
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test should return initial state when called with undefined state

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true and clear error on FETCH_ALL_REQUEST
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true and clear error on FETCH_ALL_REQUEST

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on FETCH_BY_ID_REQUEST
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on FETCH_BY_ID_REQUEST

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on CREATE_REQUEST
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on CREATE_REQUEST

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on UPDATE_REQUEST
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on UPDATE_REQUEST

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on DELETE_REQUEST
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test request actions should set loading=true on DELETE_REQUEST

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should set items and clear loading on FETCH_ALL_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should set items and clear loading on FETCH_ALL_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should set selected and clear loading on FETCH_BY_ID_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should set selected and clear loading on FETCH_BY_ID_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should append the new item on CREATE_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should append the new item on CREATE_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should replace matching item on UPDATE_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should replace matching item on UPDATE_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should also update selected when its id matches on UPDATE_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should also update selected when its id matches on UPDATE_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should leave selected alone on UPDATE_SUCCESS when its id does not match
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should leave selected alone on UPDATE_SUCCESS when its id does not match

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should filter out the deleted item on DELETE_SUCCESS
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should filter out the deleted item on DELETE_SUCCESS

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should clear selected on DELETE_SUCCESS when its id matches
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should clear selected on DELETE_SUCCESS when its id matches

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should leave selected alone on DELETE_SUCCESS when its id does not match
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test success actions should leave selected alone on DELETE_SUCCESS when its id does not match

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error and clear loading on FETCH_ALL_FAILURE
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error and clear loading on FETCH_ALL_FAILURE

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error on CREATE_FAILURE
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error on CREATE_FAILURE

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error on DELETE_FAILURE
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test failure actions should set error on DELETE_FAILURE

testcase.classname: weatherForecast reducer test unknown action should return current state unchanged
testcase.name: weatherForecast reducer test unknown action should return current state unchanged

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test root watcher (weatherForecastSaga) should fork all takeLatest watchers in order
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test root watcher (weatherForecastSaga) should fork all takeLatest watchers in order

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should call svc.getAll and dispatch fetchAllSuccess on happy path
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should call svc.getAll and dispatch fetchAllSuccess on happy path

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should dispatch fetchAllFailure with the error message on error
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should dispatch fetchAllFailure with the error message on error

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should fall back to "Unexpected error" when thrown value has no message
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test fetchAll saga should fall back to "Unexpected error" when thrown value has no message

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test fetchById saga should call svc.getById with the id and dispatch fetchByIdSuccess
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test fetchById saga should call svc.getById with the id and dispatch fetchByIdSuccess

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test fetchById saga should dispatch fetchByIdFailure on error
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test fetchById saga should dispatch fetchByIdFailure on error

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test createForecast saga should call svc.create with the payload and dispatch createSuccess
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test createForecast saga should call svc.create with the payload and dispatch createSuccess

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test createForecast saga should dispatch createFailure on error
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test createForecast saga should dispatch createFailure on error

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test updateForecast saga should call svc.update with id and full payload, then dispatch updateSuccess
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test updateForecast saga should call svc.update with id and full payload, then dispatch updateSuccess

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test updateForecast saga should dispatch updateFailure on error
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test updateForecast saga should dispatch updateFailure on error

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test deleteForecast saga should call svc.remove with the id and dispatch deleteSuccess with the same id
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test deleteForecast saga should call svc.remove with the id and dispatch deleteSuccess with the same id

testcase.classname: weatherForecast saga test deleteForecast saga should dispatch deleteFailure on error
testcase.name: weatherForecast saga test deleteForecast saga should dispatch deleteFailure on error

testcase.classname: ForecastCreateForm Test should render ForecastCreateForm
testcase.name: ForecastCreateForm Test should render ForecastCreateForm

testcase.classname: ForecastCreateForm Test should render Date, Temperature, and Summary fields
testcase.name: ForecastCreateForm Test should render Date, Temperature, and Summary fields

testcase.classname: ForecastCreateForm Test should render the submit button labeled "Create forecast"
testcase.name: ForecastCreateForm Test should render the submit button labeled "Create forecast"

testcase.classname: ForecastCreateForm Test should disable the submit button when the disabled prop is true
testcase.name: ForecastCreateForm Test should disable the submit button when the disabled prop is true

testcase.classname: ForecastCreateForm Test should enable the submit button when the disabled prop is false
testcase.name: ForecastCreateForm Test should enable the submit button when the disabled prop is false

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should render WeatherForecastView
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should render WeatherForecastView

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should dispatch FETCH_ALL_REQUEST on mount
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should dispatch FETCH_ALL_REQUEST on mount

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should render the forecast count from items in the store
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should render the forecast count from items in the store

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should render the selected forecast block when a forecast is selected
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should render the selected forecast block when a forecast is selected

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should render the error message when error is present in store
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should render the error message when error is present in store

testcase.classname: WeatherForecastView Test should not render the selected forecast block when nothing is selected
testcase.name: WeatherForecastView Test should not render the selected forecast block when nothing is selected
